a260712p1.summary: Justice commissioner Michael McGrath says Brussels seeks to strengthen social media safeguards — Brussels is preparing …
a260712p1.title: EU Justice Commissioner Michael McGrath says the EC is set to propose new digital rules by year-end aimed at protecting consumers from online spending traps (Laura Dubois/Financial Times)

a260712p2.summary: Vendelux, a company that helps CMOs figure out their live events strategy, raised $50 million. — It plans to use the new round …
a260712p2.title: NYC-based Vendelux, a live B2B event information platform for CMOs and marketing and sales teams, raised a $50M Series B led by Tribeca Venture Partners (Lucia Moses/Business Insider)

a260712p3.summary: Hotel bookings fall short of expectations as price-conscious fans opt to stay in American homes
a260712p3.title: AirDNA: during the FIFA World Cup group stage, platforms such as Airbnb saw 52K+ new listings in US host cities, while hotel bookings fell short of expectations (Financial Times)

a260712p4.summary: The resistance to artificial intelligence is growing over fears about human extinction—but one activist's disappearance has the movement on edge
a260712p4.title: A look at the growing anti-AI movement in the Bay Area, as the disappearance of Sam Kirchner, co-founder of a hard-line activist group, has the movement on edge (Zusha Elinson/Wall Street Journal)

a260712p5.summary: Our obsession with AI code-writing tools is overwhelming the web's unsung human caretakers. If you are reading the digital version …
a260712p5.title: Users of AI coding tools are flooding open-source projects with low-quality contributions, overwhelming maintainers and potentially eroding community engagement (Sam Learner/Financial Times)
